summary: Iteration 28 — GAP 1/2/3 testing. 13/13 backend tests pass. All 3 GAPs verified: phone normalization, inventory stats, CFO async polling. CFO frontend page stuck loading due to slow AI call on /api/cfo/semaforo (>30s).

minor.issue: AI call takes >30s, blocking the CFO page initial load — all 4 concurrent Promise.all calls wait for this

ui_bugs.issue: Page stuck on loading spinner because Promise.all in load() waits for /cfo/semaforo which takes >30s (AI call). Users see only a spinner with no content.

action_items: Optional: Decouple /cfo/semaforo from the initial Promise.all in CFO.tsx to avoid blocking page render. Load semaforo independently with its own loading state, so the rest of the page content (P&G, informes list) renders first.
critical_code_review_comments: GAP 1 (normalizar_telefono): Function correctly handles all 4 phone formats. Webhook _detect_sender normalizes before DB lookup. loanbook.py normalizes at line 240. All good.

GAP 2 (sync_inventario_desde_compra): Function present in post_action_sync.py, CASO 4 (registrar_factura_compra) invokes it via meta.get('motos_a_agregar'). GET /api/inventario/stats returns all required fields.

GAP 3 (CFO async): POST /api/cfo/generar uses BackgroundTasks and returns job_id in <1s. GET /api/cfo/status/{job_id} returns current state. Full polling flow completed successfully in ~90s (AI call takes time). CFO.tsx uses setInterval every 2s with max 45 attempts (90s). Code is correct.
CFO page UX: /cfo/semaforo blocks page render for 30+ seconds. Consider making it load independently.

success_rate.frontend: 75% — page loads, navigation works, CFO page stuck on spinner due to slow AI

seed_data_creation: 1 test loan created (TEST_GapUser, plan P39S, telefono normalized to +573109999888)
mocked_apis: Mercately WhatsApp send API (MOCKED — enviar_whatsapp returns False)
context_for_next_testing_agent: GAP 1/2/3 all verified working via backend tests. normalizar_telefono: 4 formats tested OK. Webhook returns 200/ok. Loanbook phones all +57. Inventario stats: total/disponibles/vendidas/entregadas/total_inversion all returned. CFO async: generar returns job_id in <1s, polling flow completes in ~90s with informe_id. CFO frontend page stuck on spinner due to /cfo/semaforo taking 30+s. This is a known slow AI call issue.
rca_of_issues: CFO page spinner: load() in CFO.tsx calls Promise.all([semaforo, pyg, informe-mensual, informes]). The /cfo/semaforo endpoint calls AI (consolidar_datos_financieros + generar_semaforo via LLM), taking >30s. Fix: either make semaforo load independently (not blocking), or add timeout/fallback. The GAP 3 button itself (handleGenerar) is correctly async.
